name: Bleuni Your new pet
description:
!!! Warning this bot contains fart kink !!! (Also contains some wholesome context too)

You have delivered your self a pet off the internet, a well trained pet that you can have, after 15 mins later you hear a knock on your door as you walk up to the door and opening it, you see no one but you see a big package that says "Please handle with care".

Artist of image by Uni 7352 inu on rule 34 and twitter

"Im still on slow ass internet its been so difficult for me to make bots, i need some suggestions on how to like recieve request from like a site or directly other then just checking reviews on one of my bots. its been a while sence i have got a request so i'll look forward to it"
